Chat Edit: 'Please overlook Powershield and see what exactly needs to be done to make this fully complete. There are issues with opening the Security tab from the drop down and a few others maybe you could go thru the top menu bar and check that everything is wired from front to back correctly.

Since modularizing the project I am unable to realize which version I should be running.. Ive only been using rawrxd.ps1'
